name: Sausage Egg Scramble Bowl
st: Brown sausage in a skillet over medium heat, breaking it up, 5-6 min.
Add diced bell pepper; cook 2 min.
Pour in beaten eggs; scramble until just set.
Top with cheese and serve as a bowl or in warmed tortillas.

name: Greek Yogurt Power Bowl
st: Scoop yogurt into a bowl.
Top with granola, sliced banana, and peanut butter.
Drizzle with honey.

name: Steak & Egg Hash
st: Cook potatoes and diced onion in an oiled skillet until browned, 8-10 min; set aside.
Sear steak 3-4 min per side; rest, then dice.
Fry eggs to your liking.
Combine potatoes and steak; top with eggs and cheese.

name: Protein Oatmeal
st: Cook oats with milk per package directions.
Stir in protein powder off the heat.
Top with peanut butter and blueberries.

name: Breakfast Burritos
st: Cook bacon until crisp; drain and chop.
Scramble eggs in the same pan.
Fill tortillas with eggs, bacon, cheese, and salsa; roll up.

name: Ham & Cheese Egg Muffins
st: Heat oven to 350°F; grease a muffin tin.
Whisk eggs and milk; stir in ham, diced pepper, and cheese.
Fill cups and bake 18-20 min until set.

name: Ground Turkey Breakfast Skillet
st: Brown turkey 5-6 min; season with salt and pepper.
Add potatoes; cook until crispy, about 8 min.
Wilt in spinach, then crack eggs on top; cover until whites set.
Finish with cheese.

name: Bagel, Egg & Sausage Sandwich
st: Cook sausage patty 3-4 min per side.
Fry eggs in butter.
Toast bagel; stack with sausage, eggs, and cheese.

name: Cottage Cheese Protein Pancakes
st: Blend cottage cheese, eggs, oats, and banana until smooth.
Cook pancakes on a greased griddle 2-3 min per side.
Serve with maple syrup.

name: Chorizo Breakfast Tacos
st: Brown chorizo 5-6 min.
Scramble eggs into the chorizo until set.
Serve in warm tortillas with cheese and salsa.

name: Tofu Scramble Wraps
st: Crumble tofu into a hot oiled skillet.
Add diced bell pepper; cook 4-5 min, seasoning with salt and pepper.
Wilt in spinach and stir in cheese.
Serve in warmed tortillas.

name: French Toast + Bacon
st: Cook bacon until crisp.
Whisk eggs, milk, and cinnamon; dip bread slices to coat.
Cook 2-3 min per side until golden; serve with syrup.

name: Smoked Salmon Bagel
st: Toast bagel.
Spread with cream cheese.
Top with smoked salmon, thin-sliced red onion, and capers.

name: Chicken Caesar Wrap
st: Chop romaine and shred chicken.
Toss with dressing and parmesan.
Roll tightly into a tortilla.

name: Turkey Avocado Sandwich + Chips
st: Toast bread if desired.
Layer turkey, provolone, and sliced avocado.
Serve with chips.

name: Tuna Rice Bowl
st: Microwave rice per package.
Mix drained tuna with mayo and sriracha.
Top rice with tuna and sliced cucumber.

name: Chicken Quesadillas
st: Layer chicken and cheese between tortillas.
Cook in a dry skillet 2-3 min per side until crisp and melted.
Slice; serve with salsa and sour cream.

name: Cold Soba Noodle Bowl
st: Cook soba per package; rinse under cold water.
Toss with soy sauce and sesame oil.
Top with chicken and sliced cucumber.

name: BBQ Chicken Flatbread
st: Heat oven to 425°F.
Spread BBQ sauce on flatbread; top with chicken, onion, and mozzarella.
Bake 8-10 min until melted and edges crisp.

name: Ground Turkey Lettuce Wraps + Rice
st: Brown turkey; stir in soy and hoisin.
Microwave rice.
Spoon turkey and rice into romaine leaves.

name: Steak Salad
st: Sear steak 3-4 min per side; rest 5 min, then slice thin.
Toss greens with halved tomatoes and ranch.
Top with steak and blue cheese.

name: Chicken Rice Soup + Roll
st: Simmer broth with sliced carrot 8 min.
Add chicken and rice; simmer 5 min more.
Serve with a warm roll.

name: Ham & Swiss Melt + Fruit
st: Butter bread; layer ham and Swiss.
Grill 3 min per side until golden and melted.
Serve with grapes.

name: Crispy Tofu Sandwich
st: Slice tofu into planks; pat dry and pan-fry in oil 3-4 min per side until golden.
Mix mayo and sriracha; spread on the roll.
Layer tofu with sliced cucumber and shredded carrot.

name: Italian Sub
st: Split the hoagie roll.
Layer salami, ham, and provolone.
Add lettuce and drizzle with Italian dressing.

name: Chicken Pesto Pasta Salad
st: Cook rotini; rinse under cold water.
Toss with pesto, chicken, halved tomatoes, and mozzarella.
Chill or serve right away.

name: Egg Salad Sandwich + Fruit
st: Hard-boil eggs 10 min; cool and chop.
Mix with mayo and mustard; season with salt and pepper.
Pile onto bread; serve with grapes.

name: Chicken Thighs & Rice
st: Cook rice per package.
Sear thighs skin-side down 6-7 min; flip and cook 5 min more.
Add minced garlic, soy, and honey; simmer until glazed.
Steam broccoli; serve everything over rice.

name: Baked Chicken Thighs, Potatoes & Green Beans
st: Heat oven to 425°F.
Toss everything with oil and seasoning on a sheet pan.
Roast 30-35 min until chicken reaches 165°F and potatoes are tender.

name: Ground Beef Burrito Bowls
st: Brown beef; season generously.
Microwave rice; warm the beans.
Layer bowls with rice, beef, and beans; top with cheese, salsa, and sour cream.

name: Salmon, Rice & Asparagus
st: Heat oven to 400°F; start the rice.
Roast salmon and asparagus with butter, salt, and pepper 12-14 min.
Serve over rice with a squeeze of lemon.

name: Pork Chops & Roasted Sweet Potatoes
st: Heat oven to 425°F; roast sweet potato wedges tossed with oil and brown sugar 25 min.
Sear chops 4-5 min per side to 145°F internal.
Steam broccoli and serve.

name: Crispy Tofu Stir-Fry
st: Press tofu 15 min; cube and toss with cornstarch.
Pan-fry in oil until golden on all sides; remove.
Stir-fry vegetables; return tofu with soy and sesame oil.
Serve over rice.

name: Chicken Thigh Fajita Skillet
st: Season thighs with fajita seasoning; sear 5-6 min per side, then slice.
Sauté sliced pepper and onion in the same pan.
Serve in warm tortillas with cheese.

name: Spaghetti with Meat Sauce
st: Cook spaghetti.
Brown beef with minced garlic; stir in marinara and simmer 10 min.
Serve over pasta topped with parmesan.

name: Ground Turkey Taco Night
st: Brown turkey; season with salt or taco seasoning.
Warm taco shells.
Assemble with lettuce, cheese, salsa, and sour cream.

name: Sheet Pan Sausage & Veggies
st: Heat oven to 425°F.
Toss sliced sausage, halved potatoes, and chopped vegetables with oil.
Roast 25-30 min, stirring once halfway.

name: Beef Stir-Fry
st: Slice steak thin; toss with cornstarch.
Sear in a hot pan 2-3 min; remove.
Stir-fry vegetables; return beef with soy and garlic.
Serve over rice.

name: Chicken Alfredo
st: Cook fettuccine.
Sear diced thighs with minced garlic until cooked through.
Stir in alfredo sauce; toss with pasta and parmesan.

name: Shrimp Tacos
st: Toss shrimp with taco seasoning; sauté 2-3 min per side.
Mix coleslaw with ranch and lime juice.
Assemble in warm tortillas.

name: Turkey Burgers & Sweet Potato Fries
st: Bake fries per package.
Form turkey into a patty; season well.
Cook 5-6 min per side to 165°F; melt cheese on top.
Serve on the bun with lettuce.

name: Baked Ziti
st: Heat oven to 375°F; cook ziti 2 min shy of package time.
Brown beef; mix with marinara, ziti, and ricotta in a baking dish.
Top with mozzarella; bake 20 min until bubbly.

name: Honey Garlic Tofu Bowls
st: Press and cube tofu; pan-fry in oil until golden.
Add honey, soy, and minced garlic; toss to glaze.
Serve over rice with steamed broccoli.

name: Tofu Tacos
st: Crumble tofu into a hot oiled skillet; sauté with taco seasoning 6-8 min until browned.
Warm tortillas.
Fill with tofu, slaw, salsa, and sour cream.

name: Peanut Tofu Noodles
st: Cook noodles; steam broccoli.
Whisk peanut butter, soy, minced garlic, and a splash of hot pasta water into a sauce.
Pan-fry cubed tofu until golden.
Toss everything together in the sauce.

name: Tofu Fried Rice
st: Cook or reheat rice (day-old works best).
Pan-fry cubed tofu until golden; push aside and scramble eggs in the pan.
Add rice, peas and carrots, and soy; stir-fry 3-4 min.
Finish with sesame oil.

name: BBQ Tofu Bowls
st: Press and cube tofu; pan-fry until crisp.
Toss with BBQ sauce.
Serve over rice with warmed corn and coleslaw mix.

name: Chicken Parmesan
st: Heat oven to 400°F; cook spaghetti.
Season chicken and sear 3 min per side in an oven-safe pan.
Top with marinara and mozzarella; bake 12-15 min to 165°F.
Serve over spaghetti with parmesan.

name: Meatball Subs
st: Heat oven to 375°F.
Simmer meatballs in marinara until heated through.
Fill the roll, top with mozzarella, and bake 8-10 min until melted.

name: Tilapia, Rice & Zucchini
st: Cook rice.
Sauté sliced zucchini with garlic; set aside.
Pan-sear tilapia in butter 3 min per side.
Finish with a squeeze of lemon.

name: Pulled Pork Sandwiches
st: Warm pulled pork with BBQ sauce.
Toast the bun.
Pile pork on the bun and top with coleslaw mix.

name: Turkey Chili
st: Brown turkey with diced onion.
Add tomatoes, drained beans, and chili seasoning.
Simmer 20 min; top with cheese.

name: Apple + Peanut Butter
st: Slice apple; dip in peanut butter.

name: Cottage Cheese + Pineapple
st: Spoon pineapple over cottage cheese.

name: Trail Mix Handful
st: Mix together and portion into a bag.

name: Cheese Stick + Beef Jerky
st: Grab and go.

name: Greek Yogurt + Honey
st: Drizzle honey over yogurt.

name: Hummus + Carrots + Pretzels
st: Dip carrots and pretzels in hummus.

name: Banana Protein Shake
st: Blend milk, protein powder, and banana until smooth.

name: Hard-Boiled Eggs + Everything Seasoning
st: Boil eggs 10 min; cool in ice water.
Peel and sprinkle with seasoning.

name: Steamed Edamame
st: Microwave edamame per package directions; sprinkle with salt.

name: Steak Breakfast Tacos
st: Season and sear steak 3-4 min per side; rest 5 min, then slice thin.
Scramble eggs in the same pan.
Fill warm tortillas with steak, eggs, cheese, and salsa.

name: Ground Beef & Egg Breakfast Skillet
st: Brown beef in a skillet; season with salt and pepper.
Add potatoes; cook until crisp, about 8 min.
Push aside and scramble eggs in the pan.
Top with cheese and salsa.

name: Buffalo Chicken Breakfast Wrap
st: Toss shredded chicken in buffalo sauce; warm through in a pan.
Scramble eggs.
Fill tortillas with chicken, eggs, and cheese; roll up.

name: Cajun Shrimp & Grits
st: Cook grits per package directions; stir in butter and cheddar.
Season shrimp with cajun seasoning.
Sauté shrimp 2-3 min per side until pink.
Serve shrimp over grits.

name: Philly Cheesesteak Sandwich
st: Slice steak thin.
Sauté steak with sliced peppers and onion 5-6 min.
Pile onto the roll; top with provolone and melt under the broiler 1-2 min.

name: Steak Fajita Bowl
st: Season and sear steak 3-4 min per side; slice thin.
Sauté peppers and onion with fajita seasoning.
Serve steak and peppers over rice.

name: Beef Taco Salad
st: Brown beef; season with taco seasoning.
Layer lettuce, beef, and cheese in a bowl.
Top with crushed tortilla chips and salsa.

name: Ground Beef & Cheese Quesadilla
st: Brown beef; season with salt and pepper.
Layer beef and cheese between tortillas.
Cook in a dry skillet 2-3 min per side until crisp and melted.
Serve with salsa and sour cream.

name: Tuna Melt
st: Mix tuna with mayo.
Spread onto bread; top with cheddar.
Butter the outside; grill 3 min per side until golden and melted.

name: Crab Cake Sandwich
st: Cook crab cakes per package, about 3-4 min per side.
Assemble on the bun with lettuce and tartar sauce.
Finish with a squeeze of lemon.

name: Bacon Cheeseburger & Fries
st: Bake fries per package directions.
Cook bacon until crisp.
Form beef into a patty; grill 4-5 min per side, melting cheese on top in the last minute.
Build the burger with bacon; serve with fries.

name: Loaded Baked Potato with Chili
st: Bake potato at 425°F for 45-50 min, or microwave 8-10 min.
Brown beef with diced tomatoes and chili seasoning; simmer 10 min.
Split the potato and top with chili, cheese, and sour cream.

name: Garlic Butter Steak Bites & Rice
st: Cook rice.
Sear cubed steak in butter 3-4 min until browned; add minced garlic in the last minute.
Steam green beans.
Serve steak over rice with beans.

name: Steak & Potato Skillet
st: Par-cook diced potatoes in an oiled skillet 8 min.
Add steak, peppers, and onion; cook 6-8 min until steak is browned and potatoes tender.

name: Chicken Bacon Ranch Pasta
st: Cook pasta.
Cook bacon until crisp; chop.
Sear diced chicken until cooked through, 6-8 min.
Toss pasta with chicken, bacon, ranch, and cheese.

name: Sausage & Peppers Pasta Bake
st: Heat oven to 375°F; cook pasta 2 min shy of package time.
Brown sausage with sliced pepper.
Mix with marinara and pasta in a baking dish; top with mozzarella.
Bake 15 min until bubbly.

name: Seared Scallops & Rice
st: Cook rice.
Pat scallops dry; sear in butter 2 min per side until golden.
Add minced garlic in the last 30 seconds.
Serve over rice with a squeeze of lemon.

name: Baked Cod & Veggies
st: Heat oven to 400°F; toss potatoes with oil and roast 15 min.
Add cod and green beans; roast 12-15 min more until fish flakes easily.
Finish with a squeeze of lemon.

name: Salmon Patties & Veggies
st: Mix salmon, egg, and breadcrumbs; form into patties.
Pan-fry in butter 3-4 min per side until golden.
Steam broccoli and serve alongside.

name: Shrimp Scampi
st: Cook spaghetti.
Sauté shrimp in butter and garlic 2-3 min per side until pink.
Toss with pasta and a squeeze of lemon.

name: Loaded Veggie Frittata
st: Heat oven to 375°F.
Whisk eggs with milk; stir in spinach, pepper, and cheese.
Pour into a greased oven-safe skillet.
Bake 18-20 min until set.

name: Ham & Cheese Quiche
st: Heat oven to 375°F.
Whisk eggs and milk; stir in ham and cheese.
Pour into the pie crust.
Bake 35-40 min until set.

name: Turkey & Cheese Roll-Ups
st: Lay out turkey slices; top each with a piece of cheese.
Roll tightly; slice into pinwheels if desired.

name: Chicken Salad Lettuce Cups
st: Mix shredded chicken with mayo and diced celery.
Spoon into lettuce cups.

name: Tuna Packet + Crackers
st: Open the tuna packet and eat with crackers.

name: Buffalo Chicken Bites
st: Toss shredded chicken in buffalo sauce; warm if desired.
Serve with celery sticks.
